name: Narrative Depth
consequences: Immediate: Enhanced player engagement → Systemic: Increased game replay value (25% increase in player retention) → Strategic: Strengthened brand reputation through immersive storytelling.
options: In-depth character backstories and relationships
Complex crime lord politics with branching storylines
Emergent narratives through NPC interactions and dynamic heists
review: Controls Creative Freedom vs. Commercial Viability.

name: Procedural Generation
consequences: Immediate: Increased game variety → Systemic: Enhanced replay value (15% increase in player retention) → Strategic: Competitive edge through unique gameplay experiences.
options: Static city layouts with procedural events

review: Weakness: The options fail to consider the impact on game balance and fairness.
